determinism_note: This file intentionally contains no timestamp. The signing record (signature_timestamp in prediction.md) supplies the temporal anchor; the SHA-256 of this file is a function only of the registered inputs.
physics_status: leading-order σ-metrology shift implemented; second-order σ-modified recombination pending (M201)

sub_predictions.physics_status: Includes leading freeze-frame metrology shift (σ(z=0)/σ(z_drag) ratio). Does NOT yet include second-order σ-modified recombination corrections (modified z_drag, modified c_s(z) inside the sound-horizon integral). These are gating work for v12-cycle M201+ and will narrow the prediction band.
